title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for event prediction markets after four years of regulatory battles and legal challenges. The company achieved a $22 billion valuation by focusing on creating legitimate market infrastructure rather than a gambling product, demonstrating rapid scaling once regulatory approval was secured.
